title: Building a dynamic personal site with Antigravity and Gemma 4
summary: Rody Davis demonstrated building a serverless, VS Code-styled website generator using Google Antigravity and Gemma. The system leverages Gemini to summarize posts and embedding-gemma to vectorize content at compile time, enabling dynamic recommendations with offline vector search.
writeup: Rody Davis walks through building a serverless, VS Code-styled website generator with Google Antigravity and Gemma. Gemini handles post summarization while embedding-gemma vectorizes content at compile time, which moves the heavy work to build rather than runtime. The result supports dynamic recommendations through offline vector search, so the generated site can surface related posts without a live inference backend.
